name: 偏心惡母（重男輕女/偏愛養女）
name_en: Biased Evil Mother (Favoring Adopted over Biological)
description: 將親生女兒當工具人使用，一切以養女為中心，製造最深層的親情背叛傷痛。這個角色的存在讓觀眾的憤怒值持續拉滿。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: I regret bringing her back, too. If her blood type wasn't a match for yours, so we could drain her blood, I would have long ago thrown this useless invalid out of our house to die.
examples.context: 將親生女兒當工具人使用，一切以養女為中心，製造最深層的親情背叛傷痛。這個角色的存在讓觀眾的憤怒值持續拉滿。
